summary: Comprehensive testing of Global Signature Storage, Per-page Stamp Positions, and Default CENTER Position features - Backend 100% pass, Frontend UI fully functional

backend_api_tests: POST /api/advocate/signature - Upload signature image file - PASS
POST /api/documents/stamp - Single page CENTER position - PASS
POST /api/documents/stamp - Multi-page with per-page positions - PASS
POST /api/documents/stamp - Signature placeholder (sign after printing) - PASS
POST /api/documents/stamp - Different shapes (rectangle, circle, oval) - PASS
frontend_ui_tests: Shape selector (Rectangle, Circle, Oval) visible - PASS
Progress bar (Document → Position → Details → Generate) visible - PASS
PDF upload works (3 pages detected) - PASS
Stamp positioned at CENTER by default - PASS
Page navigation (1/3) works for multi-page PDFs - PASS
'All Pages' button visible and clickable - PASS
Per-page position controls appear when 'All Pages' selected - PASS
Page position navigation bar shows [1] [2] [3] buttons - PASS
'✓ Position saved per page - navigate to adjust each' message shown - PASS
Stamp Options section shows Certification and Notarization types - PASS
'Use Digital Signature' option visible with saved signature preview - PASS
'Sign After Printing' option visible with placeholder description - PASS
Signature option disabled when no saved signature - PASS
Generate Verified Stamp button visible and clickable - PASS

default_center_position.description: Stamp defaults to CENTER of page on upload and page changes
default_center_position.implementation: getStampPosition() calculates center based on page dimensions

per_page_positions.description: Each page remembers its own position when 'All Pages' is selected
per_page_positions.implementation: stampPositions object stores {pageNum: {x, y}} for each page

all_pages_controls.description: Blue navigation bar with page buttons appears when All Pages selected

signature_digital.description: Use Digital Signature option embeds saved signature

signature_placeholder.description: Sign After Printing creates empty signature box for physical signature
signature_placeholder.ui_text: Empty signature box for physical signature

critical_code_review_comments: Center position calculation is correct: (pageDimensions.width * previewScale - stampSize.width) / 2
Per-page positions are correctly stored in stampPositions state object as {pageNum: {x, y}}
Backend correctly iterates per_page_positions in embed_stamp_in_pdf function
Signature options correctly tied to stamp_type - Certification requires signature, Notarization does not
Signature upload, save, and delete endpoints all work correctly
seed_data_creation: Test stamps with TEST_ prefix created during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Global Signature Storage, Per-page Stamp Positions, and Default CENTER Position features are fully functional. Backend supports: signature upload/save/delete via /api/advocate/signature, per-page positions via positions dict in stamp_position JSON, automatic center calculation on page load. Frontend shows: All Pages selection with per-page navigation bar, signature options (Digital vs Placeholder), shape selection (Rectangle/Circle/Oval). Test PDF at /tmp/test_multipage.pdf (3 pages) can be used for multi-page testing.
screenshots_taken: .screenshots/stamp_page_initial.png - Document Stamp page with upload area
.screenshots/all_pages_selected.png - All Pages selection with per-page controls
